model_info:
ImageFlowMatcher(
  (model): UNet(
    (time_mlp1): Sequential(
      (0): SinusoidalPositionEmbeddings(
        (embedding_l): Linear(in_features=3, out_features=32, bias=True)
      )
      (1): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=32, bias=True)
      (2): SiLU()
      (3): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=32, bias=True)
    )
    (time_mlp2): Sequential(
      (0): SinusoidalPositionEmbeddings(
        (embedding_l): Linear(in_features=3, out_features=32, bias=True)
      )
      (1): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=64, bias=True)
      (2): SiLU()
      (3): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=64, bias=True)
    )
    (time_mlp3): Sequential(
      (0): SinusoidalPositionEmbeddings(
        (embedding_l): Linear(in_features=3, out_features=32, bias=True)
      )
      (1): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=128, bias=True)
      (2): SiLU()
      (3): Linear(in_features=128, out_features=128, bias=True)
    )
    (conv1): DoubleConv(
      (double_conv): Sequential(
        (0): Conv2d(1, 32, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (1): SiLU(inplace=True)
        (2): Conv2d(32, 32, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (3): SiLU(inplace=True)
      )
    )
    (pool1): MaxPool2d(kernel_size=2, stride=2, padding=0, dilation=1, ceil_mode=False)
    (conv2): DoubleConv(
      (double_conv): Sequential(
        (0): Conv2d(32, 64, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (1): SiLU(inplace=True)
        (2): Conv2d(64, 64, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (3): SiLU(inplace=True)
      )
    )
    (pool2): MaxPool2d(kernel_size=2, stride=2, padding=0, dilation=1, ceil_mode=False)
    (conv3): DoubleConv(
      (double_conv): Sequential(
        (0): Conv2d(64, 128, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (1): SiLU(inplace=True)
        (2): Conv2d(128, 128, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (3): SiLU(inplace=True)
      )
    )
    (pool3): MaxPool2d(kernel_size=2, stride=2, padding=0, dilation=1, ceil_mode=False)
    (conv4): DoubleConv(
      (double_conv): Sequential(
        (0): Conv2d(128, 256, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (1): SiLU(inplace=True)
        (2): Conv2d(256, 256, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (3): SiLU(inplace=True)
      )
    )
    (upconv3): ConvTranspose2d(256, 128, kernel_size=(2, 2), stride=(2, 2))
    (conv5): DoubleConv(
      (double_conv): Sequential(
        (0): Conv2d(384, 128, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (1): SiLU(inplace=True)
        (2): Conv2d(128, 128, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (3): SiLU(inplace=True)
      )
    )
    (upconv2): ConvTranspose2d(128, 64, kernel_size=(2, 2), stride=(2, 2))
    (conv6): DoubleConv(
      (double_conv): Sequential(
        (0): Conv2d(192, 64, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (1): SiLU(inplace=True)
        (2): Conv2d(64, 64, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (3): SiLU(inplace=True)
      )
    )
    (upconv1): ConvTranspose2d(64, 32, kernel_size=(2, 2), stride=(2, 2))
    (conv7): DoubleConv(
      (double_conv): Sequential(
        (0): Conv2d(96, 32, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (1): SiLU(inplace=True)
        (2): Conv2d(32, 32, kernel_size=(3, 3), stride=(1, 1), padding=(1, 1))
        (3): SiLU(inplace=True)
      )
    )
    (final_conv): Conv2d(32, 1, kernel_size=(1, 1), stride=(1, 1))
  )
  (criterion): MSELoss()
)
